utterances.source_text: Wir sind ein bisschen auf dem Clientdokument zurückgekommen, also müsste die Genehmigung auf nächste Woche verschoben werden.
utterances.production_ground_truth: On are slightly behind on the client file, so the approval will need to be moved to next week.
utterances.production_transcript: On the client timeline, that's it. We are behind schedule. We need to postpone validation, too. Next week.

utterance_translations.text: On are slightly behind on the client file, so the approval will need to be moved to next week.

utterances.source_text: Ich bin ausgegangen, um Brot zu kaufen, wurde abgelenkt durch ein Gespräch mit der Nachbarn und habe den Bäcker ganz vergessen.
utterances.production_ground_truth: I went out to buy bread, got sidetracked by a chat with the neighbor, and ended up forgetting the bakery entirely.
utterances.production_transcript: I was just getting bread. That was the basic idea. Who always talks about his tomatoes. Then it started to rain. I forgot the bakery. And that he was moving.

utterance_translations.text: I went out to buy bread, got sidetracked by a chat with the neighbor, and ended up forgetting the bakery entirely.

utterances.source_text: Danke, dass Sie hier sind. Ich werde zunächst das Projekt beschreiben, dann den Budget und den Zeitplan abstimmen.
utterances.production_ground_truth: Thank you for being here. I’ll first outline the project, then cover the budget and timeline.
utterances.production_transcript: I will present the project overview, then the budget and timeline.

utterance_translations.text: Thank you for being here. I’ll first outline the project, then cover the budget and timeline.

utterances.source_text: Wir können nicht so weiter machen: die Wartung zu reduzieren bringt sehr wenig und führt zu großen Ausfällen später.
utterances.production_ground_truth: We cannot keep doing this: cutting maintenance saves very little and leads to major breakdowns later.
utterances.production_transcript: This is not sustainable, even, neglects upkeep, and everything breaks down suddenly.

utterance_translations.text: We cannot keep doing this: cutting maintenance saves very little and leads to major breakdowns later.

utterances.source_text: Ich erinnere mich noch an das alte Bahnhof; wir verbrachten Sonntage dort mit meinem Bruder und saßen für Stunden im kleinen Café drinnen.
utterances.production_ground_truth: I still remember the old station; we spent Sundays there with my brother and stayed for hours in its little café.
utterances.production_transcript: I still remember the old station. We used to go there on Sundays with my brother. When he wasn't worried. And that little cafe.

utterance_translations.text: I still remember the old station; we spent Sundays there with my brother and stayed for hours in its little café.

utterances.source_text: Der Cache ist eine kleine Speichereinheit nahe dem Prozessor, die Dinge beschleunigt, indem sie häufig verwendete Daten nah am Handteller beibehält.
utterances.production_ground_truth: Cache is a small memory store near the processor that speeds things up by keeping frequently used data close at hand.
utterances.production_transcript: Cache is like a small reserve close to the processor, like keeping tools on the workbench instead of going to the shed. Each time it speeds up access to frequent data.

utterance_translations.text: Cache is a small memory store near the processor that speeds things up by keeping frequently used data close at hand.

utterances.source_text: Zuerst war das Filmstück verwirrend, aber dann verband sich alles und es herausstieß als sehr clever.
utterances.production_ground_truth: At first the film was confusing, but then everything connected and it turned out to be very clever.
utterances.production_transcript: I didn't understand it at first. Then it all clicked. It's actually very clever.

utterance_translations.text: At first the film was confusing, but then everything connected and it turned out to be very clever.

utterances.source_text: Es gab Probleme, aber man hat Anpassungen getroffen und es könnte bald teilweise wieder Gespräche geben.
utterances.production_ground_truth: There were problems, but adjustments have been made and talks may partially resume soon.
utterances.production_transcript: Some adjustments were made. Partial recovery of trade can be considered soon.

utterance_translations.text: There were problems, but adjustments have been made and talks may partially resume soon.

utterances.source_text: Ich hörte einen seltsamen Laut, dann fuhr der Wagen plötzlich um. Danach erinnere ich mich hauptsächlich an zerbrochenen Glassplittern und jemanden, der meinen Namen schrie.
utterances.production_ground_truth: I heard a strange noise, then the car suddenly spun. After that, I mainly remember shattered glass and someone shouting my name.
utterances.production_transcript: Just a strange noise, then the car slid. It suddenly swerved. I remember the glass especially, and someone shouting my name.

utterance_translations.text: I heard a strange noise, then the car suddenly spun. After that, I mainly remember shattered glass and someone shouting my name.

utterances.source_text: Das Paket wurde als versandt markiert, aber nichts war am Tor, also habe ich nichts gewartet und muss jetzt die Kundenserviceleistung anrufen.
utterances.production_ground_truth: The package was marked delivered, but nothing was at the door, so I waited for nothing and now have to call customer service.
utterances.production_transcript: The package was marked as delivered, but it wasn't there. At the door, I waited in vain. Now I have to call customer service. Customer.

utterance_translations.text: The package was marked delivered, but nothing was at the door, so I waited for nothing and now have to call customer service.
